title: API Integrations
excerpt:
I have an API of an app that we want to integrate in Monday. Yet, it’s not in the marketplace of Monday.com 
Can we even use that in our Monday.com account?

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an API of an app that we want to integrate in Monday. Yet, it’s not in the marketplace of Monday.com

Can we even use that in our Monday.com account?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @TJ_S, if you have a functional app you can use that in other accounts by sharing the app. The app does not have to be part of the monday marketplace.
